subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.11
question_html:
Which molecule contains an incomplete octet of electrons?

A. NF3

B. BF3

C. BrF

D. SF2
examiners_html: 66 % of the candidates identified BF3 as having an incomplete octet of electrons. The distractors NF3 and BrF were chosen in equal numbers, and the distractor SF2 was chosen by the least number of candidates.
